wiki.summary: “ALL THE LOVE” is the seventh track from Ye’s twelfth studio album, BULLY. The track was initially intended for Ye’s now-scrapped album, CUCK under the name “GAS CHAMBERS.” The song began as an eight minute improvised Twitch freestyle on Digital Nas' stream on April 9, 2025. “ALL THE LOVE” was seen on an iTunes tracklist Ye posted to 𝕏 (fka Twitter) on April 28, 2025. It was shown as the ninth track. The song was later played in the Sneako documentary on April 29, 2025. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “ALL THE LOVE” is the seventh track from Ye’s twelfth studio album, BULLY. The track was initially intended for Ye’s now-scrapped album, CUCK under the name “GAS CHAMBERS.” The song began as an eight minute improvised Twitch freestyle on Digital Nas' stream on April 9, 2025. “ALL THE LOVE” was seen on an iTunes tracklist Ye posted to 𝕏 (fka Twitter) on April 28, 2025. It was shown as the ninth track. The song was later played in the Sneako documentary on April 29, 2025. On May 18, 2025, the entirety of CUCK leaked following a $999 charity group buy benefiting the United States Holocaust Memorial Museum, organized via the messaging platform Discord. The leaked album files contained derogatory messaging directed at Ye within their metadata, including listing Dave Blunts as the song’s artist instead of YE, labeling the genre and date as “AI” and “1945,” and replacing the album cover with a 1994 photo of Ye wearing an antifascist shirt overlaid with the text “FUCK NAZIS” and “50 year old loser promoting fascism and hate speech.” On July 11, 2025, a new version of the song was sound tested at the stadium in Shanghai he would perform the following day. t has been speculated that the new vocals previewed are also deepfaked with AI. When the show came around, this song was not performed. On January 3, 2026, new merchandise for BULLY had appeared on a new website called bully.yeezy.com. A new tracklist for BULLY could be seen on the cassette, containing the track “ALL THE LOVE.” On January 30, 2026, a new version of the song was performed at a concert in Mexico, more specifically in Mexico City, Monumental Plaza de los Toros “La México”. The new version included live Andre Troutman talk box vocals, for the first time. Read more on Last.fm.
